title: A Marine Etching
content:
A yacht from its harbor ropes pulled free,
        And leaped like a steed o'er the race track blue,
    Then up behind her, the dust of the sea,
        A gray fog drifted, and hid her from view.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Ella Wheeler Wilcox delivers a powerful performance in "A Marine Etching"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
